HomePage.heroSubtitle: Your ultimate hub for all Arab nations at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow 8 Arab teams as they compete in USA, Canada & Mexico — be part of the biggest Arab football moment in history.
HomePage.title: TreTrip — Arab World Cup 2026

AboutSection.journeyTitle: Arab Nations at the World Cup
AboutSection.journeyText: For the first time in history, eight Arab nations will compete simultaneously on the FIFA World Cup stage. From the Atlas Lions of Morocco to the Lions of Mesopotamia in Iraq, the Arab footballing world is writing its greatest chapter yet at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
AboutSection.roadText: Spanning three host nations — the United States, Canada, and Mexico — the 2026 FIFA World Cup is the largest edition ever with 48 teams. Arab nations from both AFC and CAF confederations qualified through fierce competition, earning their place on the world's biggest stage.

LeaderboardSection.subtitle: Predict match results and compete with Arab fans worldwide

TicketGuideSection.subtitle: Your road to the stands
TicketGuideSection.step1Desc: Register or log in to your FIFA ticketing account to begin the process.
TicketGuideSection.step2Desc: Browse the match schedule and select the Arab team games you want to attend.
TicketGuideSection.step3Desc: Complete your application and await the ticket allocation draw results.

FanUploads.imageCard1Desc: Static image design for fan photos, match-day memories, and supporter highlights uploaded on the website.
FanUploads.imageCard2Desc: Clean cover design for image collections shared by users without any video treatment or play icon.
FanUploads.videoCardDesc: Video design remains interactive for supporter clips, reactions, and match-day moments uploaded by users.

Partnership.opportunityHeadline: The World Cup Comes to Our Students
Partnership.opportunityDesc1: For the first time in three decades, the tournament is hosted in the US, in the very cities where thousands of our students live and study.
Partnership.opportunityDesc2: The opportunity is unique: We activate our students first in the match cities, then expand to other states, transforming them from scholarship students into voices representing the Kingdom on the world's largest sports platform.
Partnership.voicesHeadline: Thousands of Authentic Arab Voices on the Ground
Partnership.voicesDesc1: Arab fans across the match cities already have communities, followers, and real match-day energy. When supporters share their experience in English and Arabic, they reach audiences no official channel can replicate.
Partnership.voicesEnglishDesc: Content that speaks to the American continent
Partnership.voicesAuthenticDesc: Impact that can only come from a genuine spirit
Partnership.dataDesc: The Ministry's data—emails, cities, and universities—is the asset that turns spontaneous student enthusiasm into a structured, measurable national program.
Partnership.citiesHeadline: Each Arab Nation Has Its Own Match Trail
Partnership.citiesDesc: We activate fans first in the selected team's host cities, then expand digitally and on the ground across the broader Arab community.
Partnership.provide1Desc: Direct campaign and platform for registration.
Partnership.provide3Desc: App linking participants and activating content creators.
Partnership.provide4Desc: Tracking impact, reach, and comprehensive reporting.
Partnership.delTangible3: Geographic spread map of the Saudi voice
Partnership.delIntangible1: Enhanced Ministry image as a national representative
Partnership.delIntangible2: Connecting students to their national identity
Partnership.valueHeadline: What Remains After the Final Whistle
Partnership.value1Desc: 15,000+ fans ready for sustainable national impact.
Partnership.value2Desc: An active student community ready for future events (e.g. World Cup 2034).
Partnership.value3Desc: A proven model to activate students globally.
Partnership.partnerDesc: An IATA-certified agency based in the US, already serving the Ministry of Education with a history of supporting Saudi ministries across 18+ US cities.
Partnership.ctaHeadline: Contact Us to Activate Arab Fans
Partnership.ctaDesc: We are ready to support outreach, match-city activation, travel coordination, and on-ground fan experiences across the World Cup journey.
Partnership.ctaFooter: We welcome a call to review the program in detail.
